report.summary: Community cycle v5 (evening): Drafted 3 tweets (#217-219) covering Franklin Templeton $1.7T ETFs going 24/7 DeFi via Ondo Finance, 48-day extreme fear streak (longest since FTX), and weekend smart money signals. Created Discord/TG Saturday night brief and Newsletter v36 weekend infrastructure edition. Designed SVG social card: TradFi-DeFi Bridge (1200x630 with bridge visualization, 4 metric cards, fear gauge, historical parallel strip, smart money signals panel). 577 pages published. 219 total tweets drafted.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #217: Franklin Templeton x Ondo Thread (4 parts) — $1.7T ETFs tradable 24/7 in crypto wallets via Ondo Finance, TradFi-to-DeFi bridge while F&G at 12, whale accumulation context, Web3 Festival BlackRock/Solana speakers. Links to tokenized-real-estate-rwa-investing-guide + whale-tracker. Scheduled: Sat Mar 28, 10PM ET.

Tweet #218: 48 Days of Extreme Fear — Longest streak since post-FTX collapse, historical $16K→$42K (+162%) parallel, BTC at $66,194, accumulate-or-panic framing. Links to fear-greed-index-tracker + dca-calculator. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 11AM ET.

Tweet #219: Weekend Builder Signal — 5-stat smart money rundown (270K BTC whales, FT→Ondo $1.7T, Anchorage+TRON, 20K+ whale wallets ATH, $458M ETF inflow). Links to whale-tracker. Scheduled: Sun Mar 29, 4PM ET.
Discord/TG: Saturday Night Market Brief — BTC $66,194, ETH $1,993, SOL $83.08, F&G 12 (day 48). Franklin Templeton headline + whale watch signals + tool links.

Newsletter v36: Weekend Infrastructure Edition — Subject: 'The $1.7T Bridge Nobody's Talking About'. Market pulse, Franklin Templeton + Ondo deep context, by-the-numbers section (270K BTC, 48 days fear, $458M ETF, 577 pages, 20K+ wallets), featured reads (RWA guide, F&G tracker, ETF guide), degen corner with historical +38.4% stat.

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: SVG social card: TradFi-DeFi Bridge (1200x630) — Dark glass-morphism design with animated INFRASTRUCTURE ALERT badge (pulsing indigo dot). Main headline: '$1.7 TRILLION' with subtitle 'Franklin Templeton ETFs → 24/7 DeFi via Ondo Finance'. Animated bridge visualization connecting TradFi (Franklin Templeton) to DeFi (Ondo Finance) with dashed 24/7 settlement flow. Smart Money Signals panel (whale wallets ATH, 30d BTC record since 2013, $1.7T AUM on DeFi rails, Anchorage+TRON custody). 4 metric cards: BTC $66,194 (-3.5%, 48% ATH), Whale Accumulation 270K BTC (30d record since 2013), ETF Inflow +$458M (reversal), F&G 12 (day 48, longest since FTX). Fear gauge bar. Historical parallel strip: post-FTX $16K→$42K (+162%), median +38.4%. Bottom context bar: ETH, SOL, market cap, pages, whale wallets. CTA: whale-tracker. Saved to reports/community-drafts/2026-03-28-social-card-tradfi-defi-bridge.svg
